A controls engineering partner you can trust to deliver

With offices in Birmingham city centre, we're ideally placed to serve manufacturers across the UK. From small performance improvements to complex multi-robot projects, we do exactly what we say we'll do — on time, to spec, and within budget.

What We Do

Our Core Automation Services

We provide a full spectrum of industrial automation services — delivered as individual capabilities or as a fully integrated, turnkey engineering solution.

PLC Control Systems

Robust control logic, safety systems and HMI integration using Siemens, Rockwell, Mitsubishi and Schneider.

→ Learn More

Robot Programming

Expert programming for ABB, FANUC, KUKA and Yaskawa robots across welding, handling, assembly and palletising.

→ Learn More

Electrical Design

Detailed schematics, panel layouts and cable schedules using E-PLAN and AutoCAD to industry standards.

→ Learn More

Conveyor Automation

PLC-controlled conveyor systems integrated with robotics, packaging lines and end-of-line automation.

→ Learn More

Virtual Commissioning

Offline validation using Process Simulate digital twins to reduce on-site commissioning time and risk.

→ Learn More

Robotic Palletising

Fully integrated end-of-line palletising systems with custom end-effectors and conveyor integration.

→ Learn More
Industries We Serve

Automation Expertise Across Four Key Sectors

Automotive

Automotive

BIW, paint, assembly and powertrain automation for OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers.

→ FMCG

FMCG

High-speed packaging, filling, palletising and end-of-line automation for food, drink and consumer goods.

→ Logistics

Logistics

Warehouse automation, conveyor control, palletising and airport baggage handling systems.

→ Process

Process

PLC & SCADA for distilling, brewing, oil & gas, water treatment and industrial processing.

→
Why Choose Duke

The Engineering Partner Manufacturers Trust

50+ Years Combined ExperienceSenior engineers — not graduates — on every project. Deep technical expertise and proven project management skills.
Vendor Neutral ApproachWe work with all leading PLC and robot platforms. We recommend what's right for your process, not what's most convenient for us.
Integrity & ReliabilityWe do exactly what we say we will do, when we say we will do it. Our reputation is built on keeping our word.
Full Lifecycle SupportFrom initial design and panel build through commissioning to long-term support — one partner, one point of contact.
Birmingham Based, UK NationwideCity centre location means we're well placed to reach manufacturers quickly anywhere in the UK.
Free Production Line ReviewIndependent expert eyes on your line at no cost. No obligation — just clear, practical recommendations.

Book Your Free Production Line Review

Independent expert eyes often spot bottlenecks, inefficiencies and failure points that are easy to miss from the inside. Our free line review gives you a clear written report with specific, practical recommendations — at no cost and with no obligation.

Book Now — It's Free
